hero.mechanic: impossible-acts hook + timeline beats + go-check receipts close
algoActions: profile_click + follow ('go check' sends skeptics to scroll the timeline — the follow machine)
dwell (timeline beats are serial mini-cliffhangers; long post that holds)
repost/share (RT line: asking what the money knows transfers insider identity)
reply (people relive their own USA-night stories in our mentions)
hero.negativeSignalAudit: Celebrates the US win while honoring the process; self-deprecating about the dead ticket; no dunks, no tout energy.
hero.continuity: Closes the noon-confession arc from 7/6; callback to Friday's Colombia max play; carries the week number forward without re-leading with it.
hero.screenshot: NONE on the hero — 'go check' drives profile scrolls; the timeline is the receipt
hero.text:
Yesterday I bet against my country, faded Ronaldo, and cheered when my own ticket died.

Best day of the summer. In order:

Noon — the winning wallets we track lean Belgium. Against the US. At home. I'm American. I posted it anyway and felt a little sick.

2:49 — same wallets: Spain over Ronaldo at even money. Posted 15 minutes before kick.

5:00 — Ronaldo goes home. Spain cashes.

Evening — proven American money starts showing up on the US side. Posted that too. The board moves when the money moves.

8:00 — the US knocks Belgium out. My ticket dies. I'm in my living room celebrating against my own bet.

Midnight — the board closes 4-3, +5.7 units on the day. +60 since June 1.

A month ago I stopped asking whether the money is right. Now I just ask what it knows.

Every timestamp above is a post on this timeline. Go check.
hero.rtLine: A month ago I stopped asking whether the money is right. Now I just ask what it knows.
hero.selfReplyAt25min: What the money knows today: Argentina at noon, Colombia at 4 — the same Colombia that cashed a max play Friday. The board members follow is live now. First week free. nhlsavant.com/?ref=t0707a
hero.postWindow: 8:00-9:30 AM ET — morning coffee scroll; Argentina noon game gives it a natural 3h runway
hero.version: v9 FINAL — user pushed past template formats: the unique asset is yesterday itself, told as a timestamped story every beat of which is a public tweet
hero.babysit: Reply to EVERY comment in the first 60 min; each reply naturally says 'it's on the site every morning' — the funnel conversation IS the babysitting
hero.hookRationale: Three impossible-sounding acts + a paradox in one sentence; the story is the moat — no other account has the timestamps to tell it.

gradePosts.argentinaWin:
Argentina handles it. ✅ 4 units at -285 isn't glamorous — it's just green.

Colombia +125 at 4 PM is the fun one. Same Colombia that cashed Friday's max.
gradePosts.argentinaLoss:
Argentina ML dies at noon and takes 4 units with it. Heavy favorites lose too — that's why the board sizes them, not us.

Colombia +125 at 4. The day isn't over.
